title: Metallic Silver Paper Party Bags (32cm x 13cm) 10 Count - Perfect for Celebrations and Events
features: VIBRANT & EYE-CATCHING: Stand out at your next celebration with our stunning metallic silver paper party bags! These eye-catching bags add a burst of color to any event and are sure to impress your guests.
VERSATILE SIZE: Measuring at 32cm x 13cm, these premium quality party bags are the perfect size for holding a variety of items, including treats, gifts, party favors, and more.

CONVENIENT 10-COUNT PACK: Receive 10 high-quality, eco-friendly paper party bags in each order, ensuring you have enough to cater to all your guests during weddings, birthdays, baby showers, or any special occasion.

EPIC WATER BATTLES: Sturdy and durable, our metallic silver bags are designed to withstand those epic water battles and summer fun activities, making them perfect for holding water balloons, squirt guns, or beach toys.
BOOST YOUR CELEBRATION: Capture the attention and delight of partygoers by choosing our metallic silver paper party bags as the ultimate gift or favor bag, making your event memorable.
